untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Z-Score calculation based on cointegrated portfolio price relative to moving average, with position sizing proportional to Z-Score magnitude. Z-Score is not available in the allowed indicators list. Additionally, Johansen test cointegration validation and half-life estimation cannot be expressed as simple indicator conditions. The signal's core logic (accumulate positions proportional to negative Z-Score deviation) cannot be accurately represented using only the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses price deviation from SMA as a crude proxy for mean-reversion signal, but this does NOT capture: (1) Z-Score normalization, (2) proportional position sizing based on deviation magnitude, (3) cointegration validation via Johansen test, (4) half-life confirmation. A proper implementation requires custom cointegration analysis and Z-Score calculation at the portfolio level.
